2026-06-22FAOther Than Statutory AuthorityAppointment of a Senior Advisor, Global Affairs Canada and of the Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary of Canada to the European Union, in BrusselsAppointment of the Honourable Jonathan Wilkinson, P.C., of Ottawa, Ontarioto be Senior Advisor, Global Affairs Canada, effective June 22, 2026, and concurrently Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary of Canada to the European Union, in Brussels, effective June 23, 2026.N/A
subject: Appointment of a Senior Advisor, Global Affairs Canada and of the Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary of Canada to the European Union, in Brussels
precis: Appointment of the Honourable Jonathan Wilkinson, P.C., of Ottawa, Ontarioto be Senior Advisor, Global Affairs Canada, effective June 22, 2026, and concurrently Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary of Canada to the European Union, in Brussels, effective June 23, 2026.
